name: omarchy_getting_started
content:
Getting Started 
Omarchy is instaed using an ISO. It's designed for a dedicated drive, so dua-booting
requires two disks in your machine (uness you do a manua insta to work around this).
The instaation wi wipe the seected drive and use fu-disk encryption, so be sure to
take a backup before using an existing drive!
Downoad the Omarchy ISO first, put it on a USB stick (use baenaEtcher on Mac/Windows
or caigua on Linux), and boot off the stick.
You must turn off Secure Boot and/or TPM in the BIOS. You have to turn these off to be
abe to insta Omarchy. They're Microsoft security schemes meant for Windows and
Microsoft-affiiated Linux distributions.
Then answer the configuration questions, and confirm them ike this:
Then seect a drive for your instaation, and sit back and watch the instaation show go. It
takes between 210 minutes, depending on the speed of your computer.
Getting Started · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/50/getting-started
1 of 2 2/2/26, 1:22 AM

---

Now you're ready to Omarchy!
Use a wired or 2.4ghz keyboard! 
The fu-disk encryption won't aow you to enter the password from a Buetooth keyboard
at startup. Just ike you can't use a Buetooth keyboard to enter the BIOS on a PC. You'
need a keyboard that either uses a 2.4ghz donge or a cabe (which is much nicer for
atency anyway!. I personay ove the Lofree Fow84!
Hep if you're stuck 
If you get stuck, you can usuay find someone wiing to hep in the #omarchy-hep
channe on the community Discord.
Use manua instaation for specia needs 
If you have specia needs, ike instaing Omarchy onto MSeries MacBooks Asahi Aarm or
because you want to try dua-booting on a singe drive, you shoud foow the instructions
for a manua instaation.
Getting Started · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/50/getting-started
